title: Panang Curry Brise Ferment
description: A herbal, light, romantic Egyptian dish featuring panang curry paste, ferment, and whole30-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Ferment (such as kombucha or sauerkraut juice)

instructions: Heat panang curry paste in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add bone broth and stir until it simmers.
Reduce the heat to low and add fermented liquid, lemon juice, and coconut milk, stirring continuously for about 5 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly but remains pourable.
Fold in cherry tomatoes, boiled chickpeas, and chopped fresh basil. Stir gently to combine.
Serve chilled with additional freshly chopped cilantro on top.
